ddls:
CREATE TABLE "digital_assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each digital asset */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item or product associated with the asset */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of digital asset (e.g., image, video, document) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the digital asset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the asset was uploaded */,
  "asset_title" TEXT /* Title of the digital asset */,
  "asset_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the digital asset */,
  "asset_size" TEXT /* Size of the digital asset in bytes */,
  "asset_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure the integrity of the asset */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the asset */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the asset was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the asset */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the asset was last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the asset is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_digital_assets_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the item */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the item */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the item was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the item */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the item was last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the item is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "localization" (
  "localize_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each localization record */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the digital asset being localized */,
  "gate_version" TEXT /* Version of the localization gate */,
  "loc_status" INTEGER /* Status of the localization */,
  "localize_date" TEXT /* Date the localization was updated */,
  "target_language" TEXT /* Target language for localization */,
  "target_country" TEXT /* Target country for localization */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* User assigned to the localization task */,
  "started_date" TEXT /* Date the localization task started */,
  "completed_date" TEXT /* Date the localization task was completed */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the localization record is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("localize_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_localization_loc_status FOREIGN KEY ("loc_status") REFERENCES loc_statuses ("loc_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_localization_gate_version FOREIGN KEY ("gate_version") REFERENCES gate_versions ("gate_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_localization_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES digital_assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_localization_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gate_versions" (
  "gate_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gate version */,
  "gate_version_name" TEXT /* Name of the gate version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gate version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the gate */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the gate version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the gate version was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the gate version */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the gate version was last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the gate version is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gate_version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loc_statuses" (
  "loc_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each localization status */,
  "loc_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the localization status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the localization status */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the status is the default status */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the status */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the status was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the status */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the status was last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the status is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loc_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the user account */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the user account */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the digital asset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the asset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the asset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the asset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the asset */,
  "is_restricted" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the access was restricted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES digital_assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the digital asset being revised */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date the asset was revised */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the revision */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the revision */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the revision */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the revision was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the revision */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the revision was last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the revision is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_revisions_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES digital_assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the digital asset */,
  "dependent_asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependent digital asset */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency */,
  "dependency_description" TEXT /* Description of the dependency */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the dependency */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the dependency was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the dependency */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the dependency was last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the dependency is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_dependencies_dependent_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_asset_id") REFERENCES digital_assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_dependencies_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES digital_assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the digital asset being feedbacked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the feedback */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the feedback has been resolved */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the feedback */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the feedback */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the feedback is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_feedback_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES digital_assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the digital asset being tracked */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views for the asset */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of downloads for the asset */,
  "last_accessed" TEXT /* Date the asset was last accessed */,
  "total_duration_viewed" INTEGER /* Total duration the asset was viewed */,
  "average_duration_viewed" INTEGER /* Average duration the asset was viewed */,
  "total_duration_downloaded" INTEGER /* Total duration the asset was downloaded */,
  "average_duration_downloaded" INTEGER /* Average duration the asset was downloaded */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the analytics record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the analytics record was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the analytics record */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the analytics record was last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the analytics record is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES digital_assets ("asset_id")
)
